mitigations: Lock rounding with ROUND to specified decimals; document in RoundingPolicy notes.
Add QC reconciliation and failure-highlighting cells to catch any drift before submission.
primary_risks: Refactoring to formulas could alter displayed rounded values if precision differs; mitigate via explicit ROUND.
Case inclusion logic (IncludeInCounts) must exactly reproduce a=46 and related totals; verify via QC.

mitigations: Lock rounding with ROUND to specified decimals; document in RoundingPolicy notes.
Add QC reconciliation and failure-highlighting cells to catch any drift before submission.
primary_risks: Refactoring to formulas could alter displayed rounded values if precision differs; mitigate via explicit ROUND.
Case inclusion logic (IncludeInCounts) must exactly reproduce a=46 and related totals; verify via QC.

planned_changes: Add Calculations tab with explicit formulas: PRR=(a/(a+b))/(c/(c+d)), ROR=(a/b)/(c/d), Chi-square (continuity-corrected) per packet; reference named ranges a,b,c,d; include a RoundingPolicy note.
Define named ranges: a, b, c, d, exposure_py, background_rate_per_100k; refactor Summary cells to use these names.
Implement Observed rate and Observed/Background ratio formula cells; use ROUND to required precision and annotate rounding rules.
Create Cases tab listing C1-C5 with attributes and columns IncludeInCounts, DedupMergeOf, and Rank; compute 2x2 inputs via SUMIF/SUMPRODUCT over IncludeInCounts.
Add PriorityScore tab detailing each scoring component with case references and a computed total that flows to Summary.

Introduce QC tab: reconciliation checks across Cases -> PriorityScore -> Summary; formula match checks for PRR/ROR/chi-square; explicit checks for rounding consistency; confirmation of no external links/hidden sheets.
Update signal_review_memo.md to cite workbook cells (e.g., Calculations!B10) for PRR, ROR, chi-square, observed rate, and CPS.
Re-validate all numbers after formula refactor; ensure Summary and memo values align; run QC checks and resolve any mismatches.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Address spreadsheet auditability, dedup/case traceability, and QC lineage while preserving correct quantitative results and memo rationale.
